Lugduno-Batavi 4 (1869) 299 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 30. = Osmunda bromeliifolia (C.Presl) Copel. , PJS 2c (1907) 147 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 30.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, E Asia, Japan, Java, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Taiwan. BABUYAN ISLS, BATAN, CAMIGUIN, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES, CATANDUANES, DINAGAT (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Abra, Albay, Apayao, Aurora, Batangas, Benguet, Cagayan, Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Kalinga, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao Oriental, Davao de Oro, Davao del Norte, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental (photos), Sarangani, South Cotabato, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY, SAMAR.
